hypothesis: If a classifier-free-guided score-based diffusion model trained only on metastable-state dynamics is used with score-based interpolation during reverse SDE and refined by Score-Aligned Ascent using r_SAA = s^B - s^A, then ASTRA will generate candidate transition-state structures with committors near 0.5 and a higher transition-state discovery rate than linear/geodesic interpolation baselines and ablated variants across the tested systems.
